external_systems.name: VNACCS
external_systems.description: Vietnam Automated Cargo Clearance System — fetches declaration data (inbound) and pushes channel updates / clearance status (outbound)

external_systems.name: eTax
external_systems.description: Tax obligation verification — queries tax payment status (da_nop / chua_nop / mien_thue) for a declaration

external_systems.name: eManifest
external_systems.description: Electronic manifest system — container lookup by container number. Real adapter exists but not implemented (pending GAP-005 spike)

external_systems.name: KVGS
external_systems.description: Khu vực giám sát — port scanner integration. Streams HOLD_CREATED / HOLD_RELEASED events per customs office (maHq) via KvgsNotificationService
external_systems.adapter: KvgsNotificationService (internal pub-sub, no real external adapter found)

internal_services.name: barcode-gateway
internal_services.notes: Separate NestJS service; depends on api service

internal_services.name: api
internal_services.notes: NestJS monolith; depends on PostgreSQL (db:5432) and Redis (cache:6379)
